title: David Foti
compiled_truth: David Foti is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-06-14 to 2001-05-14), David Foti sent 2 and received 79 emails, totalling 81 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (1), [Pinnamaneni Krishnarao](people/pinnamaneni-krishnarao) (1), [Osman Sezgen](people/osman-sezgen) (1), [Jeffery Fawcett](people/jeffery-fawcett) (1), [Lorraine Lindberg](people/lorraine-lindberg) (1).
